<div class="entry-content single-content">
	<p><span style="font-family: georgia, palatino, serif;"><strong>Soroti School of Comprehensive Nursing Contact Details -Find contact information for Soroti School of Comprehensive Nursing including websites, emails, phone numbers, addresses, and more.</strong></span><a href="https://doraupdates.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Dareda-School-of-Nursing.jpg"><img fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" data-attachment-id="33993" data-permalink="https://doraupdates.com/dareda-school-of-nursing-joining-instructions/dareda-school-of-nursing/" data-orig-file="https://doraupdates.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/Dareda-School-of-Nursing.jpg" data-orig-size="275,183" data-comments-opened="1" data-image-meta="{"aperture":"0","credit":"","camera":"","caption":"","created_timestamp":"0","copyright":"","focal_length":"0","iso":"0","shutter_speed":"0","title":"","orientation":"0"}" data-image-title="University of Pretoria Nursing Academic calendar" data-image-description="" data-image-caption="" data-medium-file="https://doraupdates.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/Dareda-School-of-Nursing.jpg" data-large-file="https://doraupdates.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/Dareda-School-of-Nursing.jpg" class="aligncenter size-full wp-image-33993" src="https://doraupdates.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Dareda-School-of-Nursing.jpg" alt="Soroti School of Comprehensive Nursing Contact Details" width="275" height="183"></a></p>
<h3><strong>Soroti School of Comprehensive Nursing Contact Details</strong></h3>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-d01ce11 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="d01ce11" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
<div class="elementor-widget-container">
<div class="elementor-text-editor elementor-clearfix">
<p>Soroti School of Comprehensive Nursing is a nursing school located in Soroti, Uganda. The school was established in 1958 as a basic nursing school and has since grown to offer a wide range of nursing programs, including diploma and certificate courses in nursing and midwifery.</p>
<p>The school has a team of experienced and qualified instructors who are committed to providing a supportive learning environment for students. The curriculum is designed to provide students with a solid foundation in nursing theory and practice, as well as practical skills and experience through clinical placements in hospitals and community health centers.</p>
<p>In addition to nursing and midwifery courses, Soroti School of Comprehensive Nursing also offers continuing education and professional development programs for practicing nurses, as well as short courses and workshops on a range of healthcare topics.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p style="padding-left: 40px;"><strong>See Also<em>:</em> <a href="https://doraupdates.com/category/uganda/">Soroti School of Comprehensive Nursing Vacancies</a></strong></p>
<p><span style="font-family: georgia, palatino, serif;"><strong>The Soroti School of Comprehensive Nursing Official Website</strong> is where you get legit and important information about the institution, such as; Upcoming events, Announcements, Courses offered in the institution<a href="https://doraupdates.com/">,</a> Vacancies and above all, access your student portal so as to be able to perform all kinds of academic activities.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-family: georgia, palatino, serif;">For more Enquiries, kindly visit the Official website, or do not hesitate to follow us on <a href="https://www.facebook.com/Myschoolzanews">Facebook</a> to get more Updates.</span></p>
